title: Angry Mobs
description: Allows a pack developer to add additional AI goals to existing mobs
body:
This mod allows you add AI goals to Minecraft Mobs to make them able to attack, request aid, leap or shoot objects at you. By default the mod comes with 3 config options "**angryAnimals**", "**angryReinforcements**" and "**aggressiveAnimals**".
By enabling "**angryAnimals**" it will make all vanilla animals attack you back when you hurt them.
By enabling "**angryReinforcements**" it will make all vanilla animals call reinforcements when you hurt them (which is applied to if "**angryAnimals**" is enabled).
By enabling "**aggressiveAnimals**" it will make all vanilla animals actively target players. If you wish to add different tweaks to mobs you can use the [CraftTweaker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crafttweaker "CraftTweaker") support built in to add Tweaks to vanilla and non-vanilla mobs.

The CraftTweaker support will allow you to add the following tweaks to mobs: **AttackNearest**,
**HurtByTarget**, **LeapAtTarget**, **MeleeAttack** and **ProjectileAttack**.

**AttackNearest**: Will make the mob attack the nearest target entity you supply.
**HurtByTarget**: Will make the mob attack back when hurt (if it has an attacking AI goal).
**LeapAtTarget**: Will make the mob leap at it's target.
**MeleeAttack** : Will make the mob attack the target using physical attacks.
**AttackNearest**: Will make the mob attack by shooting projectiles at it's target.
Information about the CraftTweaker support script syntax can be found on the [Wiki page](https://github.com/Mrbysco/AngryMobs/wiki/CraftTweaker "CraftTweaker support Wiki page").

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
